subcodes.first_line: God hath heard thy mention and thy praise, then thy call. He, verily, heareth whatsoever proceedeth from the tongues of His loved ones, and He is the Best [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ذکرک و ثنائک ثم ندائک انه یسمع ما یخرج من السن احبائه و انه خیر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @the power of words; of speech
